title: wonderland.jar: legacy edition
description: Wonderland.jar with the iconic visuals and atmosphere of legacy console Minecraft
body:
# Wonderland.jar: Legacy Edition
**Wonderland.jar brings back the classic console Minecraft feel using the 4JLegacy Mod to recreate the old menus, lighting, and overall atmosphere from the original console editions.**

![3rd-person screenshot of the player in the wonderland.jar dream dimension in the style of legacy console](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d9f6583ee0146bfb412116688900dfaf77a9cf0.jpeg)

The pack includes the Legacy Skin Packs Mod, so you can use classic console skins right away. 

![Legacy Console Skin Selector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed31124e6bb6c50390c23f5a5dd47ecba5170a6.jpeg)

The music is limited to tracks by C418 to keep the original Minecraft sound and mood intact.

The pack also includes Modern Beta, letting you enable world generation from any version of Minecraft you want.

Shaders are fully supported, and a VHS-style shader is already installed if you want that retro screen effect.
